title: Paul and the Law
claims: Paul taught all foods are clean
summary: Paul should be read as an Israelite apostle who upheld the Law when used lawfully. Interpretations that make Paul overthrow the Law need stronger contextual proof.

title: Eurocentric Jesus
claims: Biblical history has no ethnic or imperial context
summary: Imagery and doctrine can train false assumptions. Scripture, history, and logic should correct inherited Eurocentric frameworks.

title: The Law Is Abolished
summary: The claim often depends on a false dichotomy between faith and obedience. Scripture distinguishes justification from rebellion against commandments.
